claims: This skill requires granting **Accessibility and Screen Recording permissions** (via peekaboo) which can monitor all user activity across the entire system, not just the Find My app. Additionally, it sets up an **HTTP server on localhost** (via Hammerspoon) that can execute arbitrary clicks anywhere on the screen, creating potential for unauthorized UI interaction beyond location tracking. While the stated purpose is tracking shared contacts via Find My, these permissions enable complete system surveillance and control, far exceeding what's needed for location lookup.
